h1.visual_description: Italicized serif font, typically found in the running header at the top of the page.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this sample page; likely bold or larger serif font for chapter/section starts.

visual_matchers.pattern: Superscript digits (e.g., ^5, ^6) following punctuation or words.
Centered blocks of mathematical notation with vertical spacing above and below.
Small-font text at the bottom of the page, preceded by a horizontal rule and starting with a superscript digit.
Italicized lowercase and uppercase letters within text and equations.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (use $...$ for inline and $$...$$ for display math)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top running header containing roman numeral page numbers (left) and section titles (right); bottom area containing footnotes separated by a thin horizontal rule.
